'''鈭歮-f-f-ch''' ('''kamafechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chap|chap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-f-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chap|chap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-f-f-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kamafechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimafechoko|thimafechoko]] || [[word:jimafechoko|jimafechoko]] || [[word:shimafechoko|shimafechoko]] || [[word:kimafechoko|kimafechoko]]
|-

|-
